'''bakana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:saamlaw|saamlaw]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:saamlaw|saamlaw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bakana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bækænæth|bækænæth]] || [[word:bækænæj|bækænæj]] || [[word:bækænæsh|bækænæsh]] || [[word:bækænæ|bækænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bakakanath|bakakanath]] || [[word:bakakanaj|bakakanaj]] || [[word:bakakanash|bakakanash]] || [[word:bakakana|bakakana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bakanath|bakanath]] || [[word:bakanaj|bakanaj]] || [[word:bakanash|bakanash]] || [[word:bakana|bakana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bakafnath|bakafnath]] || [[word:bakafnaj|bakafnaj]] || [[word:bakafnash|bakafnash]] || [[word:bakafnaf|bakafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bakanatha|bakanatha]] || [[word:bakanaja|bakanaja]] || [[word:bakanasha|bakanasha]] || [[word:bakanaka|bakanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bakanath|bakanath]] || [[word:bakanaj|bakanaj]] || [[word:bakanash|bakanash]] || [[word:bakana|bakana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bakanathal|bakanathal]] || [[word:bakanajal|bakanajal]] || [[word:bakanashal|bakanashal]] || [[word:bakanakal|bakanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bakanathatha|bakanathatha]] || [[word:bakanajaja|bakanajaja]] || [[word:bakanashasha|bakanashasha]] || [[word:bakanaka|bakanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bakanathan|bakanathan]] || [[word:bakanajan|bakanajan]] || [[word:bakanashan|bakanashan]] || [[word:bakanakan|bakanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bakanathaoro|bakanathaoro]] || [[word:bakanajaoro|bakanajaoro]] || [[word:bakanashaoro|bakanashaoro]] || [[word:bakanakaoro|bakanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
